zh.Kingston Upon Hull, East Riding, Yorkshi: 英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾
英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam De Swellington於1359年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾時，他的父親Hugh DeSwillington129歲，母親Hawise Pirnhow127歲。他於1429年與Joan Dyve在英國英格蘭越可爾赫爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1428年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam De Swellington于1359年出生在英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾时，他的父亲Hugh DeSwillington129岁，母亲Hawise Pirnhow127岁。他于1429年与Joan Dyve在英国英格兰越可爾赫爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1428年在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swellington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Wellington, in Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Somerset, or from Wellington Heath (Herefordshire). All are most probably named with an unattested Old English personal name Wēola + -ing- (implying association with) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
History: Roger Wellington came to Massachusetts Bay Colony from England in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam De Swellington was born in 1359, in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh DeSwillington, was 129 and his mother, Hawise Pirnhow, was 127. He married Joan Dyve in 1429, in Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1428, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

Il a épousé Joan Dyve en 1429, à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1428, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam De Swellingtonが1359年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキングストン ウプオン ハルで生まれた時，父Hugh DeSwillingtonは129歳，母Hawise Pirnhowは127歳であった。1429年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハルでJoan Dyveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1428年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam De Swellington(이)가 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh DeSwillington(은)는 129세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Pirnhow(은)는 127세였다. 그는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 훌에서 Joan Dyve(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1428년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam De Swellington родился в 1359 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh DeSwillington было 129 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Pirnhow, 127. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dyve в 1429 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1428 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.
